name: Belgian Chocolate Snack Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Grease two 9-inch round cake pans.
3. In a large bowl, sift together sugar and cocoa.
4. Whisk in water, then oil, eggs, sour cream, and vanilla until combined.
5. Whisk in dry ingredients until smooth; stir until no lumps remain.
6. Pour batter evenly into prepared pans.
7. Bake 40-45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Cool in pans on racks for 10 minutes.
9. Invert cakes and cool completely on wire racks.
GLAZE:
1. Heat cream to boiling over medium heat.
2. Remove from heat and stir in chopped chocolate until smooth.
3. Pour glaze evenly over cooled cakes. (Can be made ahead, wrapped tightly, and frozen up to one month.)
